_meta.description: Per-field synthetic event coverage matrix for the REST /snapshot completeness conformance test (MYR-48). Catches the regression class where a wire field gets WS broadcast wiring but DB persistence is forgotten in the writer pipeline (the same class as MYR-41). The test enumerates every property in docs/contracts/schemas/vehicle-state.schema.json and, for each, applies the synthetic event declared here through the writer pipeline (or a direct seed for identity/derived fields), reads the row back via VehicleRepo.GetByVIN, and asserts the field is non-null on the read-back snapshot. Fields with category=expected_failure are KNOWN gaps tracked in dedicated Linear follow-ups (see each row's comment); the test surfaces them as t.Logf warnings so the gate stays green while the writer pipeline catches up.

vehicleId.comment: Opaque DB cuid. Seeded on vehicle creation by the Next.js app — never written by the telemetry writer pipeline. Test asserts Vehicle.ID != "" on the seeded row.

name.comment: User-assigned vehicle name. DB-seeded with non-empty value via seedVehicleWithCatalog. Test asserts Vehicle.Name != "".

model.comment: Vehicle model (Prisma NOT NULL). Seeded via catalog. Test asserts Vehicle.Model != "".

year.comment: Model year (Prisma NOT NULL). Seeded via catalog. Test asserts Vehicle.Year > 0.

color.comment: Exterior color (Prisma NOT NULL). Seeded via catalog. Test asserts Vehicle.Color != "".

status.comment: Derived from gearPosition by deriveVehicleStatus(); persisted via UpdateStatus. DB DEFAULT 'offline'. Test asserts Vehicle.Status is one of the valid VehicleStatus enum values and not the empty string.

speed.comment: DB INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0. After applying speed synthetic, expected 35.

heading.comment: GPS atomic group member. DB INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0. Active-group scenario applies all gps members together.

latitude.comment: GPS atomic group member. DB DOUBLE PRECISION NOT NULL DEFAULT 0. Test asserts non-zero (DB default 0 == 'no fix' per §2.3).

longitude.comment: GPS atomic group member. DB DOUBLE PRECISION NOT NULL DEFAULT 0. Test asserts non-zero.

locationName.comment: DB TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT ''. Populated server-side by the geocoder, not direct telemetry. VehicleUpdate.LocationName accepts the value through the writer pipeline. Empty-string-is-non-null per §1.1.

locationAddress.comment: DB TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT ''. Populated server-side by the geocoder via VehicleUpdate.LocationAddr. Empty-string-is-non-null per §1.1.

gearPosition.comment: Nullable in steady state (null = vehicle asleep or gear not yet reported). Active-group scenario asserts non-null after applying. Steady-state assertion exempted via nullableInSteadyState=true.

chargeLevel.comment: Charge atomic group member. DB INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0. Test asserts non-zero (per fixture).

chargeState.comment: Nullable in steady state — null when vehicle has never charged. DB persisted as Vehicle.chargeState String? per MYR-41. Active-group charge scenario asserts non-null after applying.

estimatedRange.comment: Charge atomic group member. DB INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0. Test asserts non-zero (per fixture).

timeToFull.comment: Nullable in steady state — null when no active charging session. DB persisted as Vehicle.timeToFull Float? per MYR-41. Active-group charge scenario asserts non-null after applying.

interiorTemp.comment: DB INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0. Test asserts non-zero.

exteriorTemp.comment: DB INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0. Test asserts non-zero.

odometerMiles.comment: DB INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0. Test asserts non-zero.

fsdMilesSinceReset.comment: DOCUMENTED GAP: schema declares fsdMilesSinceReset as a non-nullable telemetry field; ws/field_mapping.go passes it through to the WS broadcast (telemetry.FieldFSDMiles = "fsdMilesSinceReset"); but VehicleUpdate has NO FsdMilesSinceReset pointer and field_mapper.go has NO applier for telemetry.FieldFSDMiles. Result: WS clients see the value live, but the DB row keeps the seeded value forever. Cold page reload via REST /snapshot will not reflect FSD-miles-since-reset changes that occurred while the user was offline. Tracked in MYR-67 (https://linear.app/myrobotaxi/issue/MYR-67); category=expected_failure surfaces the gap as a t.Logf warning so the test stays green. The closing PR for MYR-67 re-categorizes this row to category=telemetry and the assertion becomes hard. The test seeds a non-zero baseline so the steady-state DB read returns it.

destinationName.comment: Nullable navigation group member. Active-navigation scenario asserts non-null after applying.

destinationAddress.comment: DOCUMENTED GAP: schema declares destinationAddress as a navigation atomic group member, but VehicleUpdate has NO DestinationAddress pointer and field_mapper.go has no applier — destinationAddress is currently only writable via direct INSERT/seeding (likely intended to be reverse-geocoded server-side from destinationLatitude/destinationLongitude, but no writer path exists). Tracked in MYR-68 (https://linear.app/myrobotaxi/issue/MYR-68); category=expected_failure surfaces the gap as a t.Logf warning so the test stays green. The closing PR for MYR-68 re-categorizes this row to category=telemetry|telemetry_alias and the assertion becomes hard. The synthetic uses kind=vehicleUpdate with the expected Go field name (DestinationAddress) so the missing-field reflect lookup surfaces a clear message.

destinationLatitude.comment: Navigation group member. Active-navigation scenario asserts non-null.

destinationLongitude.comment: Navigation group member. Active-navigation scenario asserts non-null.

originLatitude.comment: Navigation group member. Active-navigation scenario asserts non-null.

originLongitude.comment: Navigation group member. Active-navigation scenario asserts non-null.

etaMinutes.comment: Navigation group member. Active-navigation scenario asserts non-null.

tripDistanceRemaining.comment: Navigation group member. Active-navigation scenario asserts non-null.

navRouteCoordinates.comment: Navigation group member. JSONB column persisted as a [lng, lat] array. Active-navigation scenario asserts non-null.

lastUpdated.comment: TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW() — set by the writer on every UpdateTelemetry. Test asserts Vehicle.LastUpdated is non-zero AND was advanced by an UpdateTelemetry call (i.e., greater than the seed timestamp).
